Name: Default__TT_Perk_H_FrozenCastle_T02_C
Flags: RF_Public | RF_Transactional | RF_ClassDefaultObject | RF_ArchetypeObject | RF_WasLoaded | RF_LoadCompleted

Description.SourceString: Enemies standing on structures affected by <HeroAbility>B.A.S.E.</> are <Status>Snared</> by <Number>[Ability.Line1]%</>. Enemies that damage a structure affected by <HeroAbility>B.A.S.E.</> are <Status>Frozen</> for <Number>[Ability.Line2] seconds</>. Each enemy can be <Status>Frozen</> once every <Number>[Ability.Line3] seconds</>.
Description.LocalizedString: Enemies standing on structures affected by <HeroAbility>B.A.S.E.</> are <Status>Snared</> by <Number>[Ability.Line1]%</>. Enemies that damage a structure affected by <HeroAbility>B.A.S.E.</> are <Status>Frozen</> for <Number>[Ability.Line2] seconds</>. Each enemy can be <Status>Frozen</> once every <Number>[Ability.Line3] seconds</>.
